member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.ArbPlaceholder
member.summary: This class is used for internal needs. Applications work with class instances instead.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.ArbParser
member.summary: A parser for files in Arb format (JSON with extra features).

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.ArbParser.TextProcessingMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the text processing mode to use when decoding potentially escaped strings and when recognizing template strings in translation entries.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.ArbParser.Use
member.summary: Initializes the parser class, making it available for use.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.ArbParser.GetTextProcessingMode
member.summary: Used for internal needs.
member.returns: The effective text processing mode.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.ArbParser.CanHandleExtension(System.String)
member.summary:
Checks whether this parser can handle a translation file with the given extension.
This method is not used for configuration files.
member.param: The extension to check.
member.returns: if the extension is supported and otherwise.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.ArbParser.InternalProcessEntryPlaceholderDefinitions(Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry,System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Extracts placeholder definitions from a JSON object and stores them in the translation entry.
member.param: The entry to put the definitions to.
The object to extract definitions from.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.BaseGenerator
member.summary: Includes core functions that generate the C# source code.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.BaseJsonParser
member.summary: The base parser for JSON-formatted configuration and translation files.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.BaseJsonParser.LocaleSeparatorChar
member.summary: Gets or sets the character that is used to separate the locale name from the base name in the names of locale-specific translation files.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.BaseKeyValueParser
member.summary: The base parser for key-value configuration and translation files (ini and toml).

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.BaseKeyValueParser.LocaleSeparatorChar
member.summary: Gets or sets the character that is used to separate the locale name from the base name in the names of locale-specific translation files.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseKeyValueParser.LoadAsDictionary(System.String)
member.summary: This method loads the file as a list of key-value pairs. If sections are detected, they are added as key with values set to null.
member.param: The content to parse.
member.returns: The list of key-value pairs.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseKeyValueParser.UnwrapKey(System.String)
member.summary: Strips format-specific markers that denote the beginning and the end of a value.
member.param: The value to strip.
member.returns: The text inside the markers.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseKeyValueParser.IsEndOfValue(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Detects if the end of a value has been reached.
member.param: content to check.
current position within the content.
upon return is set to a position next to the end-of-value marker (indicates to which value the pointer must be set).
member.returns: if the end of the value has been reached, if the end has not been reached, and if the end of line was encountered and a single-line value was not closed.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseKeyValueParser.UnwrapValue(System.String)
member.summary: Strips format-specific markers that denote the beginning and the end of a value.
member.param: The value to strip.
member.returns: The text inside the markers.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.RecognizeFileRefs
member.summary:
Gets or sets the flag that tells parsers to recognize file references in translation texts.
A file reference is the text that starts with '@' character followed by the file name (with or without a path depending on other settings). If a reference is used, the text is taken from the referenced file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.KeepEntryOrder
member.summary: Gets or sets the flag that makes class preserve the order of entries as they are defined in the translation file. By default, entries are stored in a case-insensitive dictionary and their order is not preserved.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.GetTextProcessingMode
member.summary: Used for internal needs.
member.returns: The effective text processing mode.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.GetLocaleSeparatorChar
member.summary: Used for internal needs.
member.returns: The character, used to separate the base file name and the locale.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.LoadTranslationStructure(System.String,System.String,Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration@)
member.summary:
Parses the specified configuration file, then loads the keys from the specified default translation file and builds a tree of keys.
The files are loaded from the disk - this method is intended to be used by generators and converters.
member.param: The configuration file to read.
An optional directory to language files if does not contain a directory.
The loaded configuration or if the method does not succeed.
member.returns: The constructed upon success or otherwise.
member.exception: Gets thrown when loading of a configuration file or a default translation file fails.
Gets thrown when parsing of a default translation file fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.CanHandleExtension(System.String)
member.summary:
Checks whether this parser can handle a translation file with the given extension.
This method is not used for configuration files.
member.param: The extension to check.
member.returns: if the extension is supported and otherwise.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.ParseConfigurationFile(System.String)
member.summary: Loads configuration from the file.
member.param: The name of the file to load the configuration from.
member.returns: The loaded configuration or if loading failed.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.ParseConfigurationFile(System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String)
member.summary: Loads configuration from the file stored in assembly resource.
member.param: A reference to the assembly, from which the configuration file should be loaded.

The name of the file to load the configuration from. This name must include a subdirectory (if any) in resource format, such as "Translations.Data" if the original files' subdirectory is "Translations\Data" or "Translations/Data".
member.returns: The loaded configuration or if loading failed.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.LoadTranslation(System.String,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Nullable{Tlumach.Base.TextFormat})
member.summary: Loads the translation information from the file and returns a translation.
member.param: The text of the file to load.
An optional reference to the locale, whose translation is to be loaded. Makes sense for CSV and TSV formats that may contain multiple translations in one file.
The mode of processing of the text of the translation file.
member.returns: The loaded translation or if loading failed.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.InternalLoadTranslationStructure(System.String,System.Nullable{Tlumach.Base.TextFormat})
member.summary: Loads the keys from the default translation file and builds a tree of keys.
member.param: The content to parse.
The mode of processing of the text of the default file.
member.returns: The constructed upon success or otherwise.
member.exception: Gets thrown when parsing of a default translation file fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.IsTemplatedText(System.String,System.Nullable{Tlumach.Base.TextFormat})
member.summary: Checks whether the text is templated, i.e. contains placeholders.
member.param: The text to check.
Current text processing mode.
member.returns: if the text contains placeholders and otherwise.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseParser.IsReference(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether the text is a reference.
member.param: The text to check.
member.returns: if the text is a reference and otherwise.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.BaseTableParser
member.summary: The base class for CSV and TSV parsers.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.BaseTableParser.DescriptionColumnCaption
member.summary: Use this property to override the caption by which the description column was detected.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.BaseTableParser.CommentsColumnCaption
member.summary: Use this property to override the caption by which the Comments column was detected.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.BaseTableParser.LocaleSeparatorChar
member.summary: Gets or sets the character that is used to separate the locale name from the base name in the names of locale-specific translation files.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.BaseTableParser.TreatEmptyValuesAsAbsent
member.summary:
Gets or sets the indicator that tells the parser to treat empty values as missing instead of being empty.
When the text is missing from the specific translation, the text from the basic locale or from the default locale will be used. When the text is empty, this empty value will be used without a fallback to the basic or default locale.

member.name: E:Tlumach.Base.BaseTableParser.OnCultureNameMatchCheck
member.summary: Handle this event to match the column caption to a specific locale. For example, if the request is made for "de-AT" locale, you can provide the translation from the column captioned "German".

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseTableParser.LoadAsListOfLists(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary:
This method loads the file as a list of keys and their texts.
The 0th item in the list has an empty locale and it contains keys. All other items contains the locale name and the list of values. Empty cells are represented as empty values.
member.param: The content to parse.

Specifies if only the structure (the keys, the first translation column and, if present, descriptions, examples, and comments) should be read. If the value is , the translation or translations are loaded as well depending on the value of the `specificLocale` parameter.
When set, should contain the reference to the locale to load from the file. If not set, all locales are loaded.
If a column for a specific culture was requested, this parameter will contain the index of the column in the result.
This parameter will contain the index of the description column in the result if such a column is present in the translation file.
This parameter will contain the index of the comments column in the result if such a column is present in the translation file.
member.returns: The list of key-value pairs.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseTableParser.ReadCells(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32@)
member.summary:
Reads cells from the provided text starting at position .
This is an abstract function overridden by specific parsers which implement the logic or call the method with the required parameters for the default implementation.
member.param: The text, from which the cells are read.
The starting position of the text to read from.
The current line being processed. Used for error reporting.
The container for read cells.
Upon return, is set to the position of the first character beyond the read one. EOL characters are skipped, so the value must reference the start of the next line.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.BaseTableParser.ReadDelimitedLine(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32@,System.Char,System.Boolean)
member.summary: The implementation of reading cells from the provided text starting at position .
member.param: The text, from which the cells are read.
The starting position of the text to read from.
The current line being processed. Used for error reporting.
The container for read cells.
Upon return, is set to the position of the first character beyond the read one. EOL characters are skipped, so the value must reference the start of the next line.
The separator character (comma, tab, maybe something else).
Specifies whether cells are expected to be enclosed in quotes.
member.exception: Thrown when parsing ends with unclosed quotes (when they are used).

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.CsvParser.TextProcessingMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the text processing mode to use when decoding potentially escaped strings and when recognizing template strings in translation entries.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.CsvParser.SeparatorChar
member.summary: Gets or sets the separator char used to separate values. Default is comma, but Excel uses semicolon ';' as a separator for exported CSVs.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.CsvParser.Use
member.summary: Initializes the parser class, making it available for use.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.CultureNameMatchEventArgs.Candidate
member.summary: Gets the value to match.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.CultureNameMatchEventArgs.Culture
member.summary: Gets the culture to match the Candidate against.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.CultureNameMatchEventArgs.Match
member.summary: Gets or sets the flag that says whether the value in Candidate corresponds to the culture.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.TemplateProcessingException
member.summary: This exception gets thrown when an error occurs when processing a translation unit that is a template and inserting values into this template.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TextParseException.StartPosition
member.summary: The starting position of the text block that could not be parsed.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TextParseException.EndPosition
member.summary: The ending position of the text block that could not be parsed.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TextParseException.LineNumber
member.summary: The line number in which the error occurred.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TextParseException.ColumnNumber
member.summary: The column number in which the error occurred.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TextFileParseException.FileName
member.summary: The name of the file, parsing of which has failed.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.FileFormats.GetConfigParser(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a registered parser of configuration files with the given extension.
member.param: The extension for which the parser is needed.
member.returns: An instance of the found parser or otherwise.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.FileFormats.GetParser(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a registered parser of translation files with the given extension.
member.param: The extension for which the parser is needed.

When set to , uses a cached singleton (or creates one if it does not yet exist).
This parameter is used by the helper functions.
member.returns: An instance of the found parser or otherwise.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.FileFormats.GetSupportedExtensions
member.summary: Returns the list of extensions registered as recognized for translation files.
member.returns: A list of registered extensions, in lowercase.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.IcuFragment
member.summary: The parser to handle ICU-compatible placeholders in templated strings.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.IcuFragment.Evaluate(System.String,System.Int32@,System.Object,System.Func{System.String,System.Int32,System.ValueTuple{System.Object,System.Int32}},System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Func{System.Decimal,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.String})
member.summary: Tries to parse the ICU-compatible placeholder and produce a text result.
member.param: The content to parse.
The index of the placeholder in the translated string.
The value of the variable for the given placeholder name.
The function that returns the value of the placeholder by its name or index.
The culture to use in conversions.
An optional function that determines to what numeric category (zero, one, few, many, other) the value falls.
member.returns: The resulting string or on failure. If is returned, the caller uses other means of formatting.
member.exception: Thrown if an error or an unsupported ICU feature is detected.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.IcuFragment.EvaluateNoName(System.String,System.Int32@,System.Object,System.Func{System.String,System.Int32,System.ValueTuple{System.Object,System.Int32}},System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Func{System.Decimal,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.String})
member.summary: Tries to parse the ICU-compatible tail of a placeholder and produce a text result.
member.param: The tail to parse. The tail is everything after the placeholder name, which the caller deals with.
The index of the placeholder in the translated string.
The value of the variable for the given placeholder name.
The function that returns the value of the placeholder by its name or index.
The culture to use in conversions.
An optional function that determines to what numeric category (zero, one, few, many, other) the value falls.
member.returns: The resulting string or on failure. If is returned, the caller uses other means of formatting.
member.exception: thrown if an error or an unsupported ICU feature is detected.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.IniParser
member.summary: The parser for simple ini-style translation files.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.IniParser.TextProcessingMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the text processing mode to use when decoding potentially escaped strings and when recognizing template strings in translation entries.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.IniParser.Use
member.summary: Initializes the parser class, making it available for use.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.JsonParser
member.summary: The parser for simpler JSON translation files.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.JsonParser.TextProcessingMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the text processing mode to use when decoding potentially escaped strings and when recognizing template strings in translation entries.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.JsonParser.Use
member.summary: Initializes the parser class, making it available for use.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.Placeholder
member.summary: Represents a single placeholder within a templated entry.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Placeholder.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the placeholder.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Placeholder.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of the placeholder as specified in the translation file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Placeholder.Format
member.summary: Gets or sets the format of the placeholder as specified in the translation file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Placeholder.Example
member.summary: Gets or sets the example if one was provided in the translation file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Placeholder.Properties
member.summary: Contains additional (unrecognized) properties provided for the placeholder in the translation file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Placeholder.OptionalParameters
member.summary: Contains optional parameters as provided in the "optionalParameters" object for the placeholder in the translation file.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.Placeholder.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the placeholder.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.ResxParser.LocaleSeparatorChar
member.summary: Gets or sets the character that is used to separate the locale name from the base name in the names of locale-specific translation files.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.ResxParser.Use
member.summary: Initializes the parser class, making it available for use.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.TextFormat
member.summary: Specifies how the library should deal with translation entries which may support placeholders or reserved characters.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TextFormat.None
member.summary: No decoding of characters takes place, and placeholders are not detected.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TextFormat.BackslashEscaping
member.summary: Strings may contain any characters, but "unsafe" characters should be prepended with a backslash ("\"), and encoded characters are supported. This is the format used in C++, JSON strings, and TOML basic strings. Placeholders are not supported in this format.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TextFormat.Arb
member.summary: Curly braces are used to denote placeholders according to the rules defined for Arb files (those used in Dart language and Flutter framework) including the "use-escaping: true" setting.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TextFormat.ArbNoEscaping
member.summary: Curly braces are used to denote placeholders according to the rules defined for Arb files (those used in Dart language and Flutter framework). Unlike mode, quote characters (') are not considered as escape symbols.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TextFormat.DotNet
member.summary: Curly braces are used to denote placeholders according to the .NET rules used by String.Format(). Text is considered to be optionally escaped, and an attempt is made to un-escape it according to rules.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.TomlParser
member.summary: The parser for TOML translation files.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TomlParser.TextProcessingMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the text processing mode to use when decoding potentially escaped strings and when recognizing template strings in translation entries.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TomlParser.Use
member.summary: Initializes the parser class, making it available for use.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.Translation
member.summary: Contains translation entries that belong to one locale. Each entry is identified by the unique key, which is composed of the key name and the names of all its parent group names joined by dot ".", e.g., "group.subgroup.key". Key names are stored without case conversion but are searched for in a case-insensitive manner.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Translation.OriginalAssembly
member.summary: Optionally contains a reference to the assembly, from which the translation was loaded.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Translation.OriginalFile
member.summary: Optionally contains the path to the original file, from which the translation was loaded.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Translation.Locale
member.summary: Contains the locale of the file, from which the translation was loaded, if this locale was specified in the file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Translation.Context
member.summary: Contains the context of the file, from which the translation was loaded, if this context was specified in the file. Contexts are specified in ARB files and are supported and preserved by Tlumach converters.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Translation.LastModified
member.summary: May contain the value of the `@@last_modified` key of an ARB file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Translation.Author
member.summary: May contain the value of the `@@author` key of an ARB file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Translation.CustomProperties
member.summary: Gets the container that stores custom properties of an ARB file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.Translation.IsBasicCulture
member.summary: Gets or sets the indicator that the translation belongs to the "basic" culture. Basic cultures are the ones to which neutral cultures resolve. E.g.: "de-DE" is the basic culture for "de-AT" because "de" resolves to specific culture "de-DE".

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.Translation.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: An optional locale if one was specified in the translation file.
An optional value of the Context property if one was specified in the translation file.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.Translation.SetOrigin(System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the source of the translation.
member.param: may specify an assembly if the translation was loaded from assembly resources.
may specify the file if the translation was loaded from a file (and not obtained via the event).
member.returns: The object, for which the method was called.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration
member.summary: Contains the configuration built when parsing source files and passed to the translation manager by the translation unit.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_DEFAULT_FILE
member.summary: The name of the default file (the one that will be loaded by default).

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_DEFAULT_LOCALE
member.summary: The name of the locale of the text in the default file.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_GENERATED_NAMESPACE
member.summary: The name of the namespace that the generator puts to the generated source code.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_GENERATED_CLASS
member.summary: The name of the class that the generator puts to the generated source code.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_TEXT_PROCESSING_MODE
member.summary: The name of the class that the generator puts to the generated source code.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_DELAYED_UNITS_CREATION
member.summary: When set to , indicates that creation of generated translation units must be delayed until they are accessed.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_ONLY_DECLARE_KEYS
member.summary: When set to , indicates that translation units should not be generated, and only string keys should be declared.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_TRANSLATION_ASTERISK
member.summary: The optional notation to specify the file, from which all translations not listed specifically are loaded. This values gets converted to "other" in the code but may be used for clarity in the configuration files.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_TRANSLATION_OTHER
member.summary: The optional notation to specify the file, from which all translations not listed specifically are loaded.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_SECTION_TRANSLATIONS
member.summary: The name of the translations section in the configuration file.

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_LOCALE
member.summary: The name of an element in the translations section in the configuration file (XML only).

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_ATTR_NAME
member.summary: The name of the "name" attribute in the translations section in the configuration file (XML only).

member.name: F:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.KEY_SECTION_TRANSLATIONS_DOT
member.summary: The name of the translations section in the configuration file suffixed with a dot.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.Assembly
member.summary: Gets a reference to the assembly, in which the generated file resides.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.DefaultFile
member.summary: Gets a reference to the default file. The value may be a filename with or without a path, but it must include an extension, so that the proper parser can be selected.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.Namespace
member.summary: Gets the namespace, to which the generated class should belong.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.ClassName
member.summary: Gets the name of the class that is generated by the generator.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.DefaultFileLocale
member.summary: Gets a locale of the default file, if the locale was present in this file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.TextProcessingMode
member.summary: Gets the text processing mode used for parsing (it will be used for processing templates too).

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.DelayedUnitsCreation
member.summary: Gets the indicator used by the generator to generate the code that delays creation of generated translation units until they are accessed.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.OnlyDeclareKeys
member.summary: Gets the indicator used by the generator to not declare TranslationUnits and only declare string constants with keys.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.Translations
member.summary: Gets the list of individual translation items covered by the configuration. This list may be empty or incomplete, in which case, the library will use heuristics to determine the filename to load the translation from.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.DirectoryHint
member.summary:
Gets or sets the hint path that can be used when locating translation files.
When configuration is loaded by the constructors of the TranslationManager class, this property is set to whatever directory is specified in the configFile parameter of the constructor, but an application is free to change it.
Another way to specify the hint is to set the TranslationsDirectory property of TranslationManager.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.#ctor(System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String,System.String,Tlumach.Base.TextFormat)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
Usable by the code that does not use TranslationUnits.
member.param: An optional assembly that contains translations. May be empty if files are loaded from the disk.
a reference to the default file for the translation.
The locale specified in the file (when supported by the file format).
specifies how the translation entries should be parsed to determine whether they contain placeholders and to replace these placeholders with real values. See for details.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.#ctor(System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Tlumach.Base.TextFormat)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
Used by configuration parsers.
member.param: An optional assembly that contains translations. May be empty if files are loaded from the disk.
a reference to the default file for the translation.
The namespace to which the class with generated translation units belongs.
The name of the class with generated translation units.
The locale specified in the file (when supported by the file format).
specifies how the translation entries should be parsed to determine whether they contain placeholders and to replace these placeholders with real values. See for details.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration.#ctor(System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Tlumach.Base.TextFormat,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
Used by configuration parsers.
member.param: An optional assembly that contains translations. May be empty if files are loaded from the disk.
a reference to the default file for the translation.
The namespace to which the class with generated translation units belongs.
The name of the class with generated translation units.
The locale specified in the file (when supported by the file format).
Specifies how the translation entries should be parsed to determine whether they contain placeholders and to replace these placeholders with real values. See for details.
Tells the generator to generate code for delayed creation of generated translation units.
Tells the generator to skip generation of translation units and just add key constants.

summary.para: Represents an entry in the translation file. An entry may have a value (some text in a specific language) or be a reference to an external file with a translation.

Instances of this class are always owned by a dictionary which keeps the keys, and that dictionary is transferred in a way that specifies the locale. For this reason, TranslationEntry does not hold a key or locale ID.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Empty
member.summary: Gets a static instance that represents an empty entry.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Key
member.summary: Gets the original key of the entry.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Text
member.summary: Gets or sets a localized text. This text has been un-escaped (if needed) during loading from the translation file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.EscapedText
member.summary: Gets or sets a localized text that has not been un-escaped. This text is used when evaluating if the localized text contains templates and when processing those templates.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.ContainsPlaceholders
member.summary: Indicates that the text is a template and contains placeholders. When it is, use the method or its overloads to format the template.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Reference
member.summary:
Gets or sets an optional reference to an external file with the translation value.
A reference is set by the parser when the text starts with '@' (at) and the property is .

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Target
member.summary:
Gets or sets an optional target of the entry.
Targets are defined in the ARB specification as attributes of HTML elements to which the content should be assigned.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Type
member.summary:
Gets or sets an optional type of the entry.
Describes the type of resource. Possible values are "text", "image", "css".

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Context
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional description of the context.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.SourceText
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional original text that was translated.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional description of the entry.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Comment
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional comment of the entry.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Screen
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional reference to a screenshot of the entry.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Video
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional reference to a video of the entry.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Placeholders
member.summary: Gets an optional collection of placeholder descriptions.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the section, to which the entry belongs.
The key to which the translation entry corresponds.
An optional localized text of the translation entry that has been un-escaped if necessary.
An optional localized text of the translation entry that has not been un-escaped.
An optional reference to an external file with the text.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.ProcessTemplatedValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,Tlumach.Base.TextFormat,System.Func{System.String,System.Int32,System.Object})
member.summary: Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.
The required text processing mode.
The function which will be called to obtain values for the placeholders.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.ProcessTemplatedValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,Tlumach.Base.TextFormat,System.Object[])
member.summary: Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.
The required text processing mode.
The values for the placeholders of the entry.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.ProcessTemplatedValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,Tlumach.Base.TextFormat,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.
The required text processing mode.
The values for the placeholders of the entry.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.ProcessTemplatedValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,Tlumach.Base.TextFormat,System.Collections.Specialized.OrderedDictionary)
member.summary: Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.
The required text processing mode.
The values for the placeholders of the entry.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.ProcessTemplatedValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,Tlumach.Base.TextFormat,System.Object)
member.summary: Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.
The required text processing mode.
The values for the placeholders of the entry.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Lock
member.summary: For internal use only.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.Unlock
member.summary: For internal use only.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry.CompareByHierarchicalKey(Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry,Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry)
member.summary: Compares two TranslationEntry instances based on their hierarchical Key property. Parents come before their children, and children of the same parent are sorted alphabetically.
member.param: The first TranslationEntry to compare.
The second TranslationEntry to compare.
member.returns: A negative number if left comes before right, zero if equal, or a positive number if left comes after right.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.TranslationTree
member.summary:
Contains translation entries that belong to one locale as a tree.
This class is for internal use and for parsers from other formats..

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.TranslationTreeLeaf
member.summary:
Contains one translation entry in the tree.
This class is for internal use and for parsers from other formats..

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.TranslationTreeNode
member.summary:
Contains a group of translation entries in the tree.
This class is for internal use and for parsers from other formats..

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationTreeNode.Keys
member.summary: Contains the list of keys in the node. Each key is a string without parent node names in it.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TranslationTreeNode.Name
member.summary: Contains the own name of the node (without parent names).

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TsvParser.TextProcessingMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the text processing mode to use when decoding potentially escaped strings and when recognizing template strings in translation entries.

member.name: P:Tlumach.Base.TsvParser.ExpectQuotes
member.summary: Gets or sets the flag that tells the parser whether the TSV file uses quotes to wrap the text with unsafe characters (new-line characters and tabs that are a part of values).

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.TsvParser.Use
member.summary: Initializes the parser class, making it available for use.

member.name: T:Tlumach.Base.Utils
member.summary: Contains helper functions, usable across the library.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.Utils.UnescapeString(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes escaping used in JSON and TOML strings.
member.param: original string to decode.
member.returns: a decoded string.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.Utils.GetLeadingNonNegativeNumber(System.String,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Extracts the number from a string when the string starts with a positive decimal number.
member.param: The text to extract the number from.
The number of characters used from to parse as a number.
member.returns: The extracted number or -1 in the case when a number was not extracted.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.Utils.IsBoxedNumber(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if the argument is of a numeric type.
member.param: An object to check.
member.returns: if is a number and otherwise.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.Utils.IsBoxedIntegerNumber(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if the argument is of a integer type.
member.param: An object to check.
member.returns: if is a number and otherwise.

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.Utils.TryMapSkeletonToDotNetPattern(System.String,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.String@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Maps a subset of intl (ICU-style) skeletons to .NET patterns. Returns true if matched. Some map to standard format strings ("d", "D", etc.).

member.name: M:Tlumach.Base.Utils.ConvertDartDateTimePatternToDotNet(System.String)
member.summary: Translates a subset of Dart/ICU-like pattern letters to .NET custom DateTime format. Longest-token-first replacement to avoid overlaps.
